name: the committed walkthrough ADR is grounded and accepted
command: f=$(ls $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/examples/dog-walker-marketplace/artifacts/08-adr/*.json); ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(File.read(ARGV[0])); abort unless (d["grounding"]=="grounded" || (d["grounding_sources"]||[]).size>0)' "$f" && grep -q "Status: accepted" $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/examples/dog-walker-marketplace/artifacts/08-adr/*.md && echo adr-grounded-accepted 1>&2
